economic_notes: Band holds 100% of K'ul Management Group Ltd (KMGLTD) which controls entities including Westhills Aggregates LP, Coyote Cruises LP, Snpinktn Forestry LP, K'ul Construction LP, Skaha Hills Residential Development LP. Band holds 20% of Skaha Hills Limited Partnership and 25% of SnPink'Tn Developments Limited Partnership. After year end, Band approved repayment of demand loan with balance of $3,683,529.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to management not completing assessment of tangible capital assets for potential asset retirement obligations under PS 3280 (effective April 1, 2022). Comparative 2023 figures were restated: deferred revenue reduced by $2,899,577 and accumulated surplus/revenue increased accordingly. Consolidated entity includes PIB, Penticton Indian Band Utilities Limited Partnership (PIBULP), and Okanagan Nation Family Intervention and Services Society (ONTEH). K'ul Management Group Ltd accounted for under modified equity as GBE (100% owned). SHLP (20%) and SDLP (25%) also on modified equity basis. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + FNHA + FNESC + Okanagan Training & Development Council + Province of BC + BC First Nations Gaming = 13,145,807 + 186,601 + 1,940,945 + 1,110,005 + 154,843 + 7,843,666 + 662,786 + 238,394 (property taxes excluded as OSR). Note: property taxes of $2,174,851 treated as OSR. BC First Nations Gaming included as government transfer.
